prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct-injection, 310hp stock) with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (12psi boost, 550whp target) paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission and a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.10 final drive ratio).

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Burns Stainless (equal-length headers, 304-grade merge collectors, and a dual-mode Valvetronic muffler by Remus) with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise supercharger mapping.

Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable, 24-position rebound/compression damping) with custom valving for the LC470R’s aluminum-intensive chassis, paired with Cusco front strut tower bars (22mm diameter) and a Whiteline rear sway bar (24mm adjustable).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny LC470R-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof.

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,800mm width, 3D carbon fiber construction) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees) and a Vortex Generators front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-stage adjustable dive planes).

Enkei PF09 wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x11 +30 rear) in Hyper Silver with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 305/30/18 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with custom gold anodized brackets.
